name: US Standard (Stripe Tax) e-Invoicing
description: US standard invoicing adapter, contributed into invoice:adapter — sandboxed. There is no federal e-invoicing mandate, so document submission is a no-op; when Stripe Tax is enabled it creates a Stripe tax calculation (tax/calculations) for audit. The Stripe secret key stays host-side; egress is fixed to api.stripe.com. Ported from the built-in invoice_us_standard adapter.

settings.label: Enable Stripe Tax
settings.help: Set to 'true' to compute a Stripe Tax calculation per invoice and capture its id for audit. When off, submission is a no-op (sales tax is handled by the tenant's own payment_tax engine).

secrets.label: Stripe Secret Key
secrets.help: sk_live_… / sk_test_… — stored encrypted, injected host-side for the Stripe Tax API call; never seen by the plugin.
